sglang.title: Speed up per token and per tensor quant by 15%
sglang.author: zcnrex
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
#2965
Improvements

Store using uint4 cast to store 1 time for 16 fp8. Originally it stores 16 times.
Increase vec size so it's 16 fp8 -> align with 128 bit
Fix per tensor AMD error

Per Token
original
✅ All implementations match
per-token-dynamic-quant-fp8-performance:
    batch_size  se

sglang.title: [quantization] fix channelwise conversion with scalar weight scale
sglang.author: yundai424
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Fixes #4594
Modifications
In case where the weight scale tensor is a single scalar, fill it directly to weight_scale_channel. This is the case when using modelopt FP8 on cutlass FP8 compatible device, where QKVParallelLinear will be requantized to the same scale.

sglang.title: Bug fix for metrics counter
sglang.author: xiezhq-hermann
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
req.already_computed is introduced to track prefill progress (especially for chunked prefill). When --enable-metrics is turned on, this counter is used to avoid duplicated counting on cached tokens.
There is a bug in the current implementation: when decode retraction happens, the already_

sglang.title: Optimize Permute Kernel in DeepEP
sglang.author: xutizhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The current performance of DeepEP is suboptimal due to the low efficiency of PyTorch's native permute function, which is used for formatting data before and after DeepEP communication. To address this limitation, we have implemented high-efficiency Triton kernels that significantly impro

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #15269
Repro command :
VLLM_USE_V1=0 python3 benchmarks/benchmark_throughput.py --model meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-hf --backend vllm --dataset ./ShareGPT_V3_unfiltered_cleaned_split.json --num-prompts 200 --max-loras 4 --max-lora-rank 8 --lora-path yard1/llama-2-7b-sql-lora-test --enable-lora --max-n

vllm.title: [Model] Support Tele-FLM Model
vllm.author: atone
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support for Tele-FLM Model.
Tele-FLM (aka FLM-2) is a 52B open-sourced multilingual large language model that features a stable, efficient pre-training paradigm and enhanced factual judgement capabilities. Built upon the decoder-only transformer architecture, it has been trained on appr

vllm.title: [V1] Add `disable-any-whitespace` option support for xgrammar
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We support this option in V0, but it was developed in parallel to the V1
support and we forgot to port it over.
Closes #15252
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

vllm.title: Remove openvino support in favor of external plugin
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR implements the proposal from issue #14374 to remove openvino
support from main and instead move it to an external plugin repo:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-openvino
Further details on the justification can be found in the issue.
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com
